techcrunch.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
techcrunch.summary: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

techcrunch.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
techcrunch.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

techcrunch.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
techcrunch.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

techcrunch.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
techcrunch.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage

techcrunch.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
techcrunch.summary: The Series F round values Coralogix at $1.6 billion and comes less than a year after its previous raise.

techcrunch.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
techcrunch.summary: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

techcrunch.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
techcrunch.summary: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

techcrunch.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
techcrunch.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

techcrunch.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
techcrunch.summary: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

techcrunch.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
techcrunch.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.
